title: carthamus reboudianus
intro: Carthamus reboudianus, also known as Reboud's safflower, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carthamus reboudianus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in herbal remedies and supplements.
